risks: Browser transport and native transport now intentionally diverge, so regressions need both browser validation and macOS-native fixture coverage.
Key inspection, key generation, and known-host scanning still proxy through the Node backend in native mode.
opportunities: The new demo backend and browser suite can act as a stable contract seam while the remaining native transport paths move into Tauri.
The Rust transport split and localhost fixture harness make native hardening less dependent on ad hoc manual testing.
